{{Quote|Ilyamo wanted to go hiking and the best hiking is around here.|[[Angela]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:GI">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Disappearances: Gathering Information|Corellia}}</ref>}}
The '''Nomad Mountains''', also known as the '''Thaos Mountains''', were a forested [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] range on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].<ref name="SWG" /><ref name="SoF">''[[Suns of Fortune]]''</ref>

==History==
{{Quote|Lately, we've had some disappearances in the nearby mountains. No witnesses.|[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Talte]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:ANA">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|A New Assignment|Corellia}}</ref>}}
In the northern part of the mountains lay the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Doaba Guerfel/Legends|Doaba Guerfel]], which was originally a private resort simply known as Nomad's Retreat.<ref name="SWG" /><ref name="SoF" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Jareck Arned]] had a [[Valley home|home]] in the mountains where he lived a solitary life.<ref name="SWG:DASL" /> Around the same time, [[Myron Beech]] was organizing hiking trails in the Thaos Mountains.<ref name="SWG:GI" /> After [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], psychotic [[cave-dwellers]] captured two groups of hikers in the Thaos Mountains.<ref name="SWG:DFtC" /> They were finally rescued by the [[Corellian Security Force]].<ref name="SWG:DFR">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Disappearances: Final Reckoning|Corellia}}</ref>

The [[Nomad greatcoat]] was a traditional outfit of the inhabitants of the Nomad Mountains.<ref name="SoF" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Nomad Mountains first appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
Its name was revealed in the description of the city of Doaba Guerfel that was shown to players on the screen that allowed them to choose the starting location for a new character.<ref name="SWG:DG">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=other}}Starting Location: "Doaba Guerfel"</ref> These description texts were removed when [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] was made the starting city for all players with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 17 Notes for 26 May 2005|Publish 17]]" on [[May 26]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref> However, in the same game, the mountains around Doaba Guerfel were identified as the Thaos Mountains in the planetary regions of Corellia.<ref name="SWG" />
